steps.title: Identify the probability formula
steps.content: For any probability question, use the basic formula: Probability = (Favorable outcomes) / (Total outcomes). We need to find how many ways to roll a 2, and how many total possible outcomes exist.

steps.title: Apply the formula to this die
steps.content:
On a 14-sided fair die:
  • Total possible outcomes: 14 (one for each face, labeled 1 through 14)
  • Favorable outcomes (rolling a 2): 1 (only one face is labeled with a 2)
Therefore, the probability is $$\frac{1}{14}$$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
